tokenIdentity.name: EtherealAI
tokenIdentity.notes: Owner reported the first token will use EtherealAI as the token name and website identity. Deployment and external publishing remain blocked.

email.notes: Cloudflare email setup was owner-reported. EtherealAI does not store Cloudflare credentials or call Cloudflare APIs.

dnsObservation.method: local dig query from EtherealAI workspace
dnsObservation.notes: If the domain was just created, DNS delegation and Cloudflare Email Routing records may still be propagating or not configured yet.
